name: wasm-fma-regression
description: Minimal repro for a V8 wasm relaxed-SIMD FMA performance regression (Node 23 → Node 24 / V8 12.9 → V8 13.6)

scripts.disasm-old: mkdir -p dump && ~/.jsvu/bin/v8-debug-12.9.202 --no-liftoff --print-wasm-code harness.js > dump/v8-12.9-turbofan.asm 2>&1 && echo 'wrote dump/v8-12.9-turbofan.asm'
scripts.disasm-new: mkdir -p dump && ~/.jsvu/bin/v8-debug-13.6.233 --no-liftoff --print-wasm-code harness.js > dump/v8-13.6-turboshaft.asm 2>&1 && echo 'wrote dump/v8-13.6-turboshaft.asm'
scripts.disasm-both: npm run disasm-old && npm run disasm-new
